mapper.insert: insert into role_permission (role_id, permission_id,update_time) values (#{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{permissionId,jdbcType=INTEGER},sysdate()) on duplicate key update update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.select: select ppi.id, ppi.permission_name as permissionName, ppi.permission_code as permissionCode, ppi.permission_url as permissionUrl from role_permission prp LEFT JOIN permission_info ppi ON prp.permission_id = ppi.id where prp.role_id = #{roleId} AND ppi.is_enable = 1
mapper.insert:
insert into role_permission (role_id, permission_id,update_time) values
( #{item.roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.permissionId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
on duplicate key update update_time = sysdate()
